description:
🕒 09:30–12:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-hannouv-onedaymarch/

We'll guide you through about 10 kilometers of the route from last year's "Hanno New Green Two-Day March," sharing the natural attractions Hanno City has to offer. In the pleasant season of fresh greenery, visit Hanno River, Tenranzan, Azuma Gorge, Asahi Mountain, and more.

【Admission Fee】
Adults: 1,000 yen
Students: 500 yen

【Capacity】50 people

【Guide】Saitama Hanno University staff

【What to Bring】Drinking water; rain gear depending on weather conditions

【Notes】For more information, visit the Saitama Hanno University website: https://hanno-univ.net/
location: 集合 NPO法人埼玉ハンノウ大学事務局 （飯能市仲町6-1(旧飯能織物協同組合事務所棟) 西武池袋線飯能駅下車徒歩7分
summary: 🎫 Casual New Green One-Day March—Enjoy Hanno, a Forest Culture City
